mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.name, u.role, r.department FROM tbl_user u JOIN tbl_report_info r ON u.user_id = r.user_id WHERE u.role = 'REPORTER'

SELECT r.user_id, r.department, n.writer, f.file_name AS fileName, f.file_url AS filePath FROM tbl_report_info r JOIN tbl_news n ON r.user_id = n.user_id JOIN tbl_file f ON f.inst_id = n.user_id WHERE f.file_gbn_cd = 10 AND n.news_id = #{newsId} LIMIT 1
